name: Cursebound
short_description: Hunt treasure Encounter strange creatures and try to stay alive
detailed_description:
An experimental and unique single player survival horror experience that doesn't hold your hand with a focus on gameplay

-Use everything at your disposal to overcome obstacles in creative ways

-Manage your resources to evade or fight off a variety of threats

-Find plenty of secrets that can help your chances of survival

-Randomized gameplay elements for added replay value

-Creepy atmospheric environment
